# braintrustdata_function (Data Source)

Reads a Braintrust function by `id` or by searchable attributes (`project_id` + `name` or `project_id` + `slug`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read a function by ID.
data "braintrustdata_function" "by_id" {
  # replace with real ID or wire from data/resource
  id = "function-abc123"
}

# Read a function by project + name.
data "braintrustdata_function" "by_name" {
  project_id = "project-abc123" # replace with real project ID
  name       = "my-tool"
}

# Read a function by project + slug.
data "braintrustdata_function" "by_slug" {
  project_id = "project-abc123" # replace with real project ID
  slug       = "my-tool"
}

output "function_lookup" {
  value = {
    id            = data.braintrustdata_function.by_id.id
    name          = data.braintrustdata_function.by_id.name
    function_type = data.braintrustdata_function.by_id.function_type
    slug          = data.braintrustdata_function.by_id.slug
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the function. Specify either `id` or one searchable pair (`project_id` + `name`, `project_id` + `slug`).
- `name` (String) The function name. Must be specified with `project_id` when `id` is not provided and `slug` is not used.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID that scopes function lookup by searchable attributes.
- `slug` (String) The function slug. Must be specified with `project_id` when `id` is not provided and `name` is not used.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The timestamp when the function was created.
- `description` (String) A description of the function.
- `function_data` (String) The function data as a JSON-encoded string.
- `function_schema` (String) The function schema as a JSON-encoded string.
- `function_type` (String) The function type.
- `log_id` (String) The log ID associated with the function.
- `metadata` (Map of String) Metadata associated with the function as key-value pairs.
- `org_id` (String) The ID of the organization the function belongs to.
- `origin` (String) The function origin as a JSON-encoded string.
- `prompt_data` (String) The prompt data as a JSON-encoded string.
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags associated with the function.
- `xact_id` (String) The transactional ID associated with the function.
